title: Surgeon Vacancy at RML Hospital Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at RML Hospital Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
RML Hospital Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RML Hospital Holdings Services:
RML Hospital Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital Holdings Services!
